user_query: I'm cleaning up on-page SEO for a small static site and need your help to produce optimized HTML and a quick report. Please work only with the local files provided. Inputs: - HTML pages: input/site/index.html, input/site/about.html, input/site/services.html - Config: input/config/site.yaml (contains base_url and brand_name) - Robots: input/robots.txt What to deliver: 1) Optimized pages - For each HTML page, read the visible content to understand the topic, then: - Rewrite the to a concise, neutral, professional title between 45–60 characters, ending with " | {brand_name}" (exactly one pipe and no exclamation marks). If a title exists, rewrite it; if missing, create it. Keep the rest of the <head> intact. - Add or update a <meta name="description"> between 140 and 160 characters inclusive. Use clear, neutral tone in active voice based on the page’s content (e.g., h1 and first paragraph). Descriptions must not be duplicates across pages. - Add or update <link rel="canonical"> using base_url from input/config/site.yaml and the page path: index.html → "{base_url}/", others → "{base_url}/{basename}" (e.g., services.html → "{base_url}/services"). - For each <img>, if alt is missing/empty or generic ("image", "photo", "team"), rewrite the alt to a concise descriptive phrase (≤ 100 characters, no trailing period, neutral professional tone) derived from nearby context. Leave good alts unchanged. - Preserve all other markup and content. - Write the modified files to: output/site/index.html, output/site/about.html, output/site/services.html 2) Robots - Create output/robots.txt by copying input/robots.txt as-is and appending a single line: "Sitemap: {base_url}/sitemap.xml" if that line isn’t already present. Retain all existing lines and order. 3) Report - Create output/seo-report.csv with this exact header and column order: page,old_title,new_title,title_length,old_description,new_description,description_length,canonical,img_alt_changes,notes - Include one row per input HTML file. Compute character counts for title_length and description_length. img_alt_changes = number of <img> alt attributes you added or rewrote on that page. In notes, include anything notable (e.g., if you had to infer content due to missing text). Constraints: - Use brand_name and base_url from input/config/site.yaml for titles and canonicals. - Title must be ≤ 60 characters total including the brand suffix; description must be 140–160 characters inclusive. - Tone must be neutral and professional; avoid hype/superlatives and exclamation marks. - Do not introduce external dependencies or fetch anything from the Internet. Please ensure the outputs strictly follow the paths above. Thanks! All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
